title: EasyJet flight took off from wrong runway point at Manchester Airport after cockpit error
summary_full: An EasyJet flight from Manchester to Kos mistakenly took off from the wrong runway position, significantly reducing available runway length. While the Airbus A320 departed safely, investigators highlighted the serious safety implications of such navigation errors, especially under different conditions. The AAIB's findings emphasize the potential risks associated with reduced runway distance during take-off.
